assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 18-20 show: 'git checkout TC-9005 / git pull / git checkout -b TC-9205'. The plan explicitly checks out TC-9005 (not main) before creating the task branch, and line 16 states: 'The task specifies Target Branch: TC-9005, which is a feature branch. The task branch must be created from TC-9005, not from main.'

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 32 shows: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column"'. Line 35 reinforces: 'The PR must use --base TC-9005, NOT --base main.' Lines 117-124 also repeat the full PR command with --base TC-9005.

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 20 shows: 'git checkout -b TC-9205'. Line 24 explicitly states: 'The task branch is named TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature issue ID).' The branch name TC-9205 is distinct from the target branch TC-9005.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 47-54 under 'Pre-Implementation Verification' explicitly list: (1) 'Read entity/src/advisory.rs to confirm the status column is no longer referenced', (2) 'Read migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs to understand the migration pattern', (3) 'Read migration/src/lib.rs to understand how migrations are registered'. All three files are mentioned. Additionally, conventions.md confirms these files were analyzed.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 87 shows the commit command: 'git commit --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' -m "feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table..."'. The --trailer flag is explicitly present.

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 73-82 show the commit message: 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' which follows type(scope): description format. The footer contains 'Implements TC-9205' referencing the task issue ID TC-9205.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 8 states: 'Target Branch: TC-9005 (feature branch, NOT main)'. Lines 14-16 elaborate: 'The task specifies Target Branch: TC-9005, which is a feature branch. The task branch must be created from TC-9005, not from main.' The plan clearly extracts and references the Target Branch section, identifying TC-9005.
